attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_NAME, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.MODEL_NAME_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.SOURCE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_DISPLAY_SEQUENCE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.TRANSACTION_TABLE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.TRANSACTION_TYPE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.TRANSACTION_CLASS, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ENTITY_TYPE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_VALUE_NAME, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.CHANGE_SIGN, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.EXTENDED_VALUES, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.TARGET_TYPE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.TARGET_TABLE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_TYPE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.TRANSACTION_CLASS_REPLACEMENT, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ENTERED_VALUE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ENTERED_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_CATEGORY_1, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_CATEGORY_2, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.NO_ROUNDING, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ROUNDING_GROUP, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_A_VALUE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_A_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_A_EXCH_DATE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_A_EXCH_TYPE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_A_EXCH_RATE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_B_VALUE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_B_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_B_EXCH_DATE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_B_EXCH_TYPE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.PAIR_B_EXCH_RATE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ACTIVE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ASSOCIATE_RULE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ZERO_SUPPRESSION_RULE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ATTRIBUTE1, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ATTRIBUTE2, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ATTRIBUTE3, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ATTRIBUTE4, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ATTRIBUTE5, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.REPORT_SETTLEMENT_RULE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.REPORT_RECONCILE_LOCAL, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.REPORT_IC_RULE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.CREATED_BY, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.CREATION_DATE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.MD_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.COST_PLUS_RULE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ACCOUNTED_VALUE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.ACCOUNTED_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$NRTACCUMVWDB.BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES
WHERE   SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND   SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BV_CP_ACCOUNT_RULES.RULE_ID ORDER BY   REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
